Given the password field in the registration form, then guidelines are displayed below specifying minimum 8 characters, at least one uppercase and lowercase letter, one number and one special symbol.
Given the user enters a password during registration, then a strength meter updates from Weak to Excellent based on length, uppercase/lowercase letters, numbers and special characters.
Given an existing user enters a valid email and password and clicks Sign in, then they are authenticated and redirected to their account or the last page they were on.

WidgetTexts: Toolshop integrates with Google Sign-In to streamline the registration and login process. By choosing to sign in with your Google account, you authorize Toolshop to access and use your email address and profile information solely for the purpose of user identification and authentication within the application.
StateTitles: Privacy Policy - Practice Software Testing - Toolshop - v5.0
SiblingTexts: By using Toolshop, you acknowledge that you have read and understood this Privacy Policy and agree to the collection, use, and sharing of your personal information as described herein.

TopRequirements.Requirement: Given the user selects Sign in from the header, then a login form appears with fields for email and password, a Google sign-in button, and a password visibility toggle icon.
Given the user has no account, when they click the Register your account link on the login page, then a registration form appears.
Given an existing user enters a valid email and password and clicks Sign in, then they are authenticated and redirected to their account or the last page they were on.

Given the user has signed in, when they reach the Billing address step, then the page collects shipping and billing details (name, address, city, province, country etc.) similar to the registration form.

Given a new user fills in the registration form with required personal details (first name, last name, date of birth, street, postcode, city, province, telephone, email), selects their country from a drop-down, provides a password and submits, then the account is created and the user can log in.
Given the password field in the registration form, then guidelines are displayed below specifying minimum 8 characters, at least one uppercase and lowercase letter, one number and one special symbol.
Given the user enters a password during registration, then a strength meter updates from Weak to Excellent based on length, uppercase/lowercase letters, numbers and special characters.
Given the registration form, when required fields are left blank or contain invalid data, then the form displays validation errors and prevents submission.
Given a rental item card, then the page shows a clear description of the machine and its intended use.

SourceTitles: Contact Us - Practice Software Testing - Toolshop - v5.0
TargetTitles: Contact Us - Practice Software Testing - Toolshop - v5.0

TopRequirements.Requirement: Given the contact form, when the user expands the subject drop-down and chooses a topic, then the selected subject is recorded for the message.
Given all required fields are completed of the contact page, when the user clicks Send, then the message is sent and a confirmation appears.
Given the user selects Contact in the header, then a contact form appears with fields for first name, last name, email, subject drop-down, message text area and file attachment.
Given mandatory fields (first name, email, subject, message) are missing from the contact form, then the form shows error messages and prevents submission.
Given a product is unavailable, then the product card shows an "Out of stock" message and disables actions to add it to the cart.
